home.heroSubtitle: Ihahiro iguhuza n'abahinzi n'abacuruzi bari hafi yawe. Umusaruro mushya, wizewe, ukugeraho byoroshye.
home.featuredSubtitle: Hitamo mu byo ku isoko — byiza, bishya, hafi yawe.
home.howSubtitle: Intambwe eshatu zo gukora ubucuruzi bwizewe
home.step1Body: Shyiraho amafoto, ingano, n'igiciro mu minota mike.
home.step2Body: Shakisha kuri telefone cyangwa mudasobwa yawe.
home.step3Body: Hamagara cyangwa wandikire, maze mwumvikane uko umusaruro utangwa.
home.farmerBody: Bona abaguzi benshi, garagaza ubwiza, kandi ukomeze kugenzura igiciro.
home.buyerBody: Shaka ibicuruzwa biri hafi, gereranya, uvugane n'abatanga vuba.
home.whyNearbyBody: Shakisha ibicuruzwa biri hafi y'aho uri hose mu gihugu.
home.whyConnectBody: Uvugana n'umuhinzi cyangwa umuguzi mu minota mike, utagombye gukora urugendo.
home.whyPricesBody: Gereranya amakuru ku isoko kugira ngo uhitemo neza.
home.whyFarmersBody: Gura ku baturanyi kandi ufashe ubuhinzi bw'iwacu gukomeza.

listingDetail.dailyUse: Wawukoresha mu mafunguro ya buri munsi.

postHarvest.subtitle: Sangiza umusaruro wawe ku isoko maze uhuze n'abaguzi bari hafi yawe.
postHarvest.descriptionPlaceholder: Sobanura umusaruro wawe (ubwoko, ubwiza, uko watangwa...)
postHarvest.photosHelp: Ongeraho amafoto meza agaragaza umusaruro wawe (ntarenze 6)
postHarvest.uploadBody: PNG, JPG, JPEG (ntarenga 5MB kuri buri foto)
postHarvest.tipPhoto: Koresha amafoto agaragara neza kandi agaragaza umusaruro nyawo.
postHarvest.helpBody: Niba ufite ikibazo cyangwa ukeneye ubufasha, twandikire cyangwa uhamagare.
postHarvest.securityBody: Amakuru yawe n'ay'umusaruro wawe arinzwe. Ntituyasangiza abandi nta burenganzira.

howPage.intro: Ihahiro ihuza abahinzi n'abaguzi mu buryo bworoshye, bwihuse kandi bwizewe.
howPage.stepsTitle: Uko Ihahiro ikora mu ntambwe 4 zoroshye
howPage.step1Body: Umuhinzi yongeraho umusaruro afite agashyiraho amakuru n'amafoto.
howPage.step2Body: Abaguzi bashakisha umusaruro hafi yabo cyangwa ahandi hose.
howPage.step3Body: Mutangira kuganira mukoresheje telefone cyangwa WhatsApp.
howPage.step4Body: Mwumvikana aho muhurira, uko mutanga umusaruro, n'uko mwishyura.
howPage.benefitFastBody: Shakisha, ubone, kandi uvugane n'uwo mukorana mu buryo bworoshye.
howPage.benefitNearbyBody: Bona umusaruro uri hafi yawe ugabanye amafaranga y'ingendo.
howPage.benefitInfoBody: Abaguzi n'abahinzi bahana amakuru afasha ubucuruzi kuba bwizewe.
howPage.benefitTrustBody: Amakuru y'ingenzi arindwa, kandi serivisi yubakiye ku cyizere.
howPage.farmersBody: Shyira umusaruro wawe ku isoko, ugere ku baguzi benshi, kandi ugurishe neza.
howPage.buyersBody: Shakisha umusaruro mwiza, gereranya ibiciro, maze uvugane n'abahinzi byihuse.
howPage.ctaBody: Tangira gukoresha Ihahiro uyu munsi ubone cyangwa ucuruze umusaruro wawe.

aboutPage.intro1: Ihahiro ni urubuga rwubatswe mu Rwanda rugamije guhuza abahinzi n'abaguzi hifashishijwe ikoranabuhanga rigezweho.
aboutPage.intro2: Intego yacu ni ukongera agaciro ku buhinzi, gufasha abahinzi kubona isoko rihamye, no guteza imbere ubucuruzi burambye.
aboutPage.goalConnectBody: Guhuza abahinzi n'abaguzi mu buryo bworoshye.
aboutPage.goalValueBody: Guteza imbere ubuhinzi no kongera agaciro ku musaruro.
aboutPage.goalSustainableBody: Gutanga isoko rihamye, ryizewe kandi rirambye.
aboutPage.approachTechBody: Dukoresha ikoranabuhanga ryoroshye kugerwaho na bose.
aboutPage.approachMarketBody: Dutanga amakuru afasha abahinzi n'abaguzi gufata ibyemezo byiza.
aboutPage.approachPartnersBody: Dukorana n'inzego zitandukanye kugira ngo duteze imbere ubuhinzi.
aboutPage.approachSafetyBody: Dutanga serivisi zizewe kandi turinda amakuru y'abakoresha bose.
aboutPage.teamBody: Dufite ikipe y'inzobere mu ikoranabuhanga, ubuhinzi, imari, n'iterambere ry'abaturage ikora buri munsi kugira ngo Ihahiro ibere bose igisubizo cyiza.

footer.mission: Guhuza abahinzi n'abaguzi mu Rwanda n'isoko ryizewe.
footer.rights: © {year} Ihahiro Modern Agrimarket. Uburenganzira bwose burabitswe.

stub.body: Ibirimo byuzuye bizashyirwa mu isohoka rikurikira.

meta.homeDescription: Shaka cyangwa ugurishe umusaruro mu Rwanda.
